hooks.command: GATE="${ENGINEERING_OS_HOME:-$(pwd)}/scripts/enforcement/lib/hook-gate.sh"; [ -r "$GATE" ] || { echo "ERROR_FOR_AGENT: Engineering OS hard-hook wrapper missing: $GATE" >&2; exit 2; }; bash "$GATE" --event PreToolUse --matcher 'Bash' --unit "${ENGINEERING_OS_HOME:-$(pwd)}/scripts/enforcement/pre-tool-use-json-guard.sh"

CMD=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',d).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$CMD" in *grep*|*rg\ *|*ripgrep*|*find\ *|*fd\ *) [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"MANDATORY: graphify-out/graph.json exists. Run graphify query before broad raw file search."}}' || true ;; esac
command -v rtk >/dev/null 2>&1 && rtk hook claude || true

Run graphify before reading source files."}}'; fi || true

INPUT=$(cat 2>/dev/null || true); if printf '%s' "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); name=d.get('tool_name') or d.get('tool') or ''; sys.exit(0 if name.startswith('mcp__Context7__') else 1)" >/dev/null 2>&1; then bash -c '. "${ENGINEERING_OS_HOME:-$(pwd)}/scripts/enforcement/lib/evidence.sh" 2>/dev/null && evidence_record context7' 2>/dev/null || echo "WARNING_FOR_AGENT: Context7 evidence recorder failed open." >&2; fi; exit 0

SOFT="${ENGINEERING_OS_HOME:-$(pwd)}/scripts/enforcement/lib/soft-hook-gate.sh"; if [ -r "$SOFT" ]; then bash "$SOFT" --event PostToolUse --unit "${ENGINEERING_OS_HOME:-$(pwd)}/scripts/enforcement/post-tool-use-bash.sh"; else echo "WARNING_FOR_AGENT: Engineering OS soft-hook wrapper missing: $SOFT" >&2; exit 0; fi

F=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); t=d.get('tool_input',d); print(t.get('file_path','') or '')" 2>/dev/null || true); EOS_LIB="${ENGINEERING_OS_HOME:-$(pwd)}/scripts/enforcement/lib/evidence.sh"; RECORDER_FAILED=0; case "$F" in core/pattern-lifecycle.md|*/core/pattern-lifecycle.md) . "$EOS_LIB" 2>/dev/null && evidence_record read_pattern_lifecycle || RECORDER_FAILED=1 ;; core/maintenance-routine.md|*/core/maintenance-routine.md) . "$EOS_LIB" 2>/dev/null && evidence_record read_maintenance_routine || RECORDER_FAILED=1 ;; core/hooks-policy.md|*/core/hooks-policy.md) . "$EOS_LIB" 2>/dev/null && evidence_record read_hooks_policy || RECORDER_FAILED=1 ;; patterns/*|*/patterns/*) DOM=$(printf '%s' "$F" | sed 's|.*/patterns/||; s|/.*||'); . "$EOS_LIB" 2>/dev/null && { [ -n "$DOM" ] && evidence_record "patterns_read_${DOM}" || true; } || RECORDER_FAILED=1 ;; .claude/plans/*.md|*/.claude/plans/*.md) FNAME=$(basename "$F" .md); TOTAL=$(grep -cE '^\- \[(x| )\]' "$F" 2>/dev/null) || TOTAL=0; . "$EOS_LIB" 2>/dev/null && { EXISTING=$(evidence_get "dod_initial_${FNAME}" 2>/dev/null || true); [ -n "$EXISTING" ] || evidence_record "dod_initial_${FNAME}" "$TOTAL"; } || RECORDER_FAILED=1 ;; .claude/commands/superpowers-verify.md|*/.claude/commands/superpowers-verify.md) . "$EOS_LIB" 2>/dev/null && evidence_record superpowers_verify_run || RECORDER_FAILED=1 ;; esac; [ "$RECORDER_FAILED" -eq 0 ] || echo "WARNING_FOR_AGENT: Read evidence recorder failed open." >&2; exit 0

SOFT="${ENGINEERING_OS_HOME:-$(pwd)}/scripts/enforcement/lib/soft-hook-gate.sh"; if [ -r "$SOFT" ]; then bash "$SOFT" --event PostToolUse --unit "${ENGINEERING_OS_HOME:-$(pwd)}/scripts/enforcement/post-tool-use-read-evidence.sh"; else echo "WARNING_FOR_AGENT: Engineering OS soft-hook wrapper missing: $SOFT" >&2; exit 0; fi

INPUT=$(cat 2>/dev/null || true); EOS_LIB="${ENGINEERING_OS_HOME:-$(pwd)}/scripts/enforcement/lib/evidence.sh"; if PAGE_ID=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); name=d.get('tool_name') or d.get('tool') or ''; r=d.get('tool_response','') or {}; assert name.startswith('mcp__Notion__'); print((r.get('id','') or r.get('page_id','') or '') if isinstance(r,dict) else '')" 2>/dev/null); then . "$EOS_LIB" 2>/dev/null && evidence_record notion_spec_created && { [ -n "$PAGE_ID" ] && evidence_record notion_page_id "$PAGE_ID" || true; } || echo "WARNING_FOR_AGENT: Notion evidence recorder failed open." >&2; else echo "WARNING_FOR_AGENT: Notion evidence recorder received malformed input and recorded no evidence." >&2; fi; exit 0
